nodes.label: AI as communication bridge from theory to practice
nodes.label_negative: Struggling to distill details for executives
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps me figure out what pieces of data may be important to communicate and how to format it

nodes.label: AI as thinking partner for reasoning
nodes.label_negative: AI as superficial or insufficiently contextual
nodes.grounding_span: The more detail I give it, the more understanding I put into my prompts, the better AI is able to understand my intentions

nodes.label: AI as analytical guide for prioritization
nodes.label_negative: AI as rigid or unhelpful when uncertain
nodes.grounding_span: AI eventually helped me group these into price bands

nodes.label: AI reliability and factuality
nodes.grounding_span: AI currently is helping me fact-check myself

nodes.label: AI as organizational memory and scorekeeper
nodes.label_negative: AI as disconnected from business reality
nodes.grounding_span: I would like AI to be able to evaluate how effective the model was

nodes.label: AI as tool for market and business perspective
nodes.grounding_span: I'm really the one pioneering the approach of having it be a consultant for us

nodes.label: AI as supplementary aide to human expertise
nodes.grounding_span: It wasn't the AI's fault, we just weren't aware of how to reconcile freight

nodes.label: Effective communication
nodes.grounding_span: tell them what the answer is, show that you've done the work to come to that conclusion, then provide the next steps

nodes.label: Deep understanding and mastery
nodes.grounding_span: I need to know every aspect of whatever I get into so that I don't overlook anything

nodes.label: Analytical accuracy and appropriate granularity
nodes.grounding_span: don't overcomplicate by making price/ounce the primary analysis, but definitely include it as a supporting lens

nodes.label: Business process clarity and self-awareness
nodes.grounding_span: it was essentially our own lack of knowledge into what we really needed

nodes.label: Strategic decision-making and ROI evaluation
nodes.grounding_span: help us understand the financial impact so that we could better strategize

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: My experience has mostly been satisfactory, especially when I provide enough context to get what I want

nodes.label: Positive reliance on AI for bridging knowledge gaps
nodes.grounding_span: it was particularly frustrating, but it was essentially our own lack of knowledge

nodes.label: Optimism about influencing organizational AI policy
nodes.grounding_span: I basically envision AI being able to be a scorekeeper for our business

nodes.label: Proactive adaptation to AI rather than fear of replacement
nodes.grounding_span: If you don't, THEN you'll lose your job

nodes.label: Detail-oriented exhaustive analysis — needs full context before acting
nodes.grounding_span: I'm someone who likes a lot of detail. Like I need to know every aspect

nodes.label: Conversational iterative probing — guides AI through context step-by-step
nodes.grounding_span: I give it a lot of detail up front
